settings.text: Technicians experienced with Huddinge's mix of housing types and building regulations.
We handle local building permits, drilling permits and housing association approvals.
Fast service and spare parts throughout the southern Stockholm area.
Clear quote with no hidden costs – ROT deducted directly on the invoice.
Flexible financing via Klarna, instalments up to 36 months.

settings.question: How much does a heat pump cost in Huddinge?
settings.answer: A complete air-to-air installation starts from approx. 18,000 SEK. Air-to-water typically costs 65,000–120,000 SEK. Ground source starts around 180,000 SEK including drilling. After the green deduction (gröna avdraget), which covers 50% of labour costs, the net cost is significantly lower.

settings.question: Does VARMA Energy install heat pumps in all parts of Huddinge?
settings.answer: Yes. We cover all areas of Huddinge municipality including Flemingsberg, Vårby, Skogås, Stuvsta and Segeltorp. Our technicians are based locally for fast response.

settings.question: Which heat pump suits my home in Huddinge?
settings.answer: For homes with water-based heating (radiators or underfloor), air-to-water delivers the best savings. For direct electric heating, air-to-air is the most cost-effective choice. Our technician recommends the right type during the free home visit.

settings.question: How much can I save with a heat pump in Huddinge?
settings.answer: Most customers in Huddinge reduce annual heating costs by 40–60%. A typical home saves around 31,000 SEK per year after switching from direct electric heating to an air-to-water heat pump.

settings.question: Do I get ROT deduction for heat pump installation?
settings.answer: Yes. The green deduction (gröna avdraget) covers 50% of the labour cost, up to 50,000 SEK per person per year. We deduct this directly on the invoice so you never pay upfront and apply later.

settings.local_description: Huddinge has a varied housing stock with 1960s–1970s family homes in Stuvsta and Segeltorp, million-programme housing in Flemingsberg and newer builds near Skogås. Air-to-water heat pumps are the most popular choice for homes with existing water-based heating systems.
